agreements.name: CUSMA
agreements.description: Modernized replacement for NAFTA governing trade in goods, services, investment, and intellectual property across North America. Covers approximately $1.3T in annual three-way trade.
keyProvisions: Tariff-free access on ~98% of goods between the three countries
Strengthened rules of origin for automotive sector (75% North American content requirement)
New digital trade chapter prohibiting customs duties on digital products
Enhanced dairy market access commitments
Intellectual property protections (copyright extended to life + 70 years)
Currency transparency and anti-manipulation provisions
Labour and environment enforcement with trade sanctions
State-owned enterprise disciplines

agreements.name: CETA
agreements.fullName: Canada–European Union Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement
agreements.description: Canada's most comprehensive FTA, covering virtually all sectors of the Canadian and EU economies across a combined market of ~470 million people and $1.1T in bilateral trade potential.
agreements.tariffCoverage: 98% of tariffs eliminated immediately; nearly all remaining phased out within 7 years
keyProvisions: 98% of EU-Canada tariffs eliminated on Day 1; virtually all tariffs eliminated within 7 years
Enhanced Canadian agricultural access to EU (beef, pork, seafood, wheat, barley)
Canadian companies eligible for ~€240B in annual EU government procurement contracts
Mutual recognition of professional qualifications (engineers, architects, accountants)
Investment protection with reformed investor–state dispute settlement (Investment Court System)
Geographical indications protection for ~170 European food and drink products
Regulatory cooperation to reduce non-tariff barriers
Labour and environment chapters with enforcement mechanisms
Comprehensive services liberalization including financial services and telecoms

agreements.name: CPTPP
agreements.fullName: Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership
agreements.description: Eleven-nation (plus UK as of January 2024) Asia-Pacific mega-regional FTA covering 13.5% of global GDP. Provides Canadian exporters preferential access across the fast-growing Pacific Rim.
agreements.tariffCoverage: 95%+ of tariff lines eliminated across member countries
keyProvisions: Tariff elimination on 95%+ of goods traded between member countries
Enhanced Canadian access for beef, pork, dairy, and seafood in Japan and other markets
Investment protection provisions with investor–state dispute settlement
Digital trade and e-commerce chapter enabling cross-border data flows
Government procurement access across all member country markets
Intellectual property protections (with some TPP provisions suspended)
Labour standards and environment chapter with trade-linked enforcement
State-owned enterprise disciplines preventing market distortions
UK accession effective January 15, 2024 expands market coverage significantly

agreements.name: CKFTA
agreements.description: Canada's first FTA in Asia-Pacific with South Korea's $1.7T economy, the world's 12th largest. Opens one of Asia's most sophisticated manufacturing and consumer markets to Canadian exporters.
agreements.tariffCoverage: 98% of tariff lines eliminated within 10 years
keyProvisions: Tariff elimination on 98% of goods over a maximum of 10 years
Enhanced access for Canadian beef, pork, cereals, and seafood
Elimination of Korean auto tariffs giving Canadian-built vehicles market access
Services market openings including financial services, telecoms, and professional services
Government procurement access to Korean central and sub-central procurement
Intellectual property chapter aligned with international standards
Investment protection with investor–state dispute settlement

agreements.name: CUKTCA
agreements.description: Transitional agreement ensuring CETA-equivalent trade terms between Canada and the UK following Brexit. Both countries are negotiating a permanent, modernized FTA.
agreements.tariffCoverage: Equivalent to CETA — ~98% of tariffs eliminated
keyProvisions: Maintains CETA tariff schedules — ~98% of goods trade tariff-free
Preserves preferential market access for Canadian exports to the UK
Retains services and investment provisions from CETA
Government procurement access equivalent to CETA provisions
Transitional arrangement: both countries committed to negotiate a modern, permanent FTA
Rules of origin adapted for UK–Canada bilateral trade context

agreements.name: CUFTA
agreements.description: Modernized in 2024 to expand beyond goods trade into services, investment, and the digital economy, signalling Canada's long-term commitment to Ukraine's reconstruction and economic recovery.
agreements.tariffCoverage: Eliminates tariffs on virtually all goods
keyProvisions: Eliminates tariffs on virtually all goods traded between Canada and Ukraine
New services and investment chapters (added in 2024 modernization)
Digital trade provisions enabling cross-border data flows
Labour and environment standards aligned with international norms
Intellectual property protections updated to modern standards
Provisions supporting Ukraine's post-war reconstruction and EU integration path

agreements.name: CCFTA
agreements.description: One of Canada's earliest FTAs, providing duty-free or preferential access for goods. Chile is also a CPTPP partner, deepening the bilateral relationship further.
keyProvisions: Duty-free access on 97%+ of tariff lines
Investment protection with investor–state dispute settlement
Financial services liberalization
Labour and environment side agreements
Note: Chile's CPTPP membership (2018) has superseded many provisions with deeper commitments

agreements.name: COLFTA
agreements.description: Provides preferential access to one of Latin America's largest economies with 52 million consumers and significant natural resources and manufacturing sectors.
keyProvisions: Eliminates tariffs on 98% of goods
Investment protection with investor–state dispute settlement
Services and financial services liberalization
Government procurement access
Labour and environment cooperation agreements
Dispute resolution mechanism for trade matters

agreements.name: CPAFTA
agreements.description: Agreement providing preferential market access to Panama, a key logistics and financial services hub for the Americas.
keyProvisions: Eliminates tariffs on 99% of goods
Financial services chapter reflecting Panama's role as a regional financial centre
Investment protection with investor–state dispute settlement
Government procurement access
Labour and environment cooperation

agreements.name: CIFTA
agreements.description: Canada's first FTA with a Middle Eastern country, updated in 2019 to include agriculture, services, investment, and government procurement — significantly modernizing a 25-year-old relationship.
agreements.tariffCoverage: Eliminates tariffs on virtually all goods
keyProvisions: Eliminates tariffs on virtually all goods
Enhanced agricultural market access (added 2019 update)
Services and investment chapters (new in 2019 update)
Government procurement access to Israeli federal contracts (new in 2019)
Intellectual property protections
Dispute resolution mechanism

agreements.name: CJFTA
agreements.description: Agreement providing preferential access to Jordan's growing economy, an important gateway to the broader Middle East market.
keyProvisions: Eliminates most tariffs within a maximum of 10 years
Investment protection provisions
Labour and environment cooperation agreements
Dispute resolution mechanism

agreements.name: CHFTA
agreements.description: Agreement providing preferential market access for goods traded between Canada and Honduras.
keyProvisions: Tariff elimination on most goods
Services and investment provisions
Labour and environment chapters
Dispute resolution mechanism

agreements.name: Canada–EFTA FTA
agreements.fullName: Canada–European Free Trade Association Free Trade Agreement
agreements.description: Agreement with the four EFTA states (Iceland, Liechtenstein, Norway, Switzerland), providing tariff-free access for industrial goods and enhanced access for agricultural products.
agreements.tariffCoverage: Duty-free on all industrial goods; preferential rates on agriculture
keyProvisions: Duty-free access on all industrial goods immediately upon entry into force
Preferential access for agricultural products (bilateral side agreements with each EFTA state)
Investment protection provisions
Services liberalization
Fisheries chapter relevant to Iceland and Norway

agreements.name: CPFTA
agreements.description: Agreement with Peru's fast-growing commodity and manufacturing economy. Peru is also a CPTPP partner, reinforcing the bilateral relationship.
keyProvisions: Eliminates tariffs on 95%+ of goods over time
Investment protection with investor–state dispute settlement
Services and financial services chapter
Labour and environment cooperation
Note: Peru's CPTPP membership has deepened commitments further

agreements.name: CCRFTA
agreements.description: Bilateral FTA providing preferential access for goods and services between Canada and Costa Rica, one of Central America's most stable and open economies.
keyProvisions: Eliminates tariffs on most goods
Services liberalization
Investment protection provisions
Dispute resolution mechanism
